feedback.text: The digital fairness act should also look at digital games in the future. Pre-all digital online games can be victims of this, the operator decides to continue playing in a single player, offline or through a third party, without any motive, for example by a group of fans who continue to operate servers without earning money with the game. There is a need to regulate the owners of the licence and the digital product, not lose their rights, but do not lose their rights as customers. Currently, Willkuer vn Publishers, developers and owners are exposed to customers, and often only use their legally acquired product through illegal means. Both the industry and the unabated representation of the player should be involved in this process. See Stop killng games initiative
